nasb.text: If you return to the Almighty, you will be restored; If you remove unrighteousness far from your tent,

esv.text: If you return to the Almighty you will be built up; if you remove injustice far from your tents,

cnv.text: 你若歸向全能者，就必得建立； 你若使不義遠離你的帳棚，

ccb.text: 你若归向全能者，就必得到恢复。 你若将罪恶从帐篷中远远赶走，
